headline: Yellen says Iran conflict puts Fed on hold, complicates rate cuts
summary: Investing.com -- Former Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen said the Iran conflict will hit US economic growth and increase inflationary pressures, making the Federal Reserve more reluctant to cut interest rates.

raw.headline: Yellen says Iran conflict puts Fed on hold, complicates rate cuts

headline: GO's Q4 Earnings Coming Up: Will the Stock Extend Its Beat Streak?
summary: Grocery Outlet's Q4 results are likely to benefit from modest gains from store refresh efforts, though softer traffic and margin pressure weighed on trends.

raw.headline: GO's Q4 Earnings Coming Up: Will the Stock Extend Its Beat Streak?

headline: Brown-Forman Q3 Earnings: Is It Likely to Surpass Estimates?
summary: BF.B heads toward Q3 results, with revenues and earnings expected to fall, as soft demand, lower volumes and cost pressures cloud its outlook.

headline: Chevron, Exxon price targets raised at BofA on increased oil risk premium
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has lifted its price targets for Chevron and ExxonMobil as geopolitical tensions drive a higher risk premium into global crude markets.

raw.headline: Chevron, Exxon price targets raised at BofA on increased oil risk premium

headline: Iran Conflict: Which trades & themes are most at risk?
summary: Investing.com -- The military conflict involving Iran is escalating more quickly and more broadly than markets had anticipated, placing several widely held trades at risk, according to UBS analyst Bhanu Baweja.

raw.headline: Iran Conflict: Which trades & themes are most at risk?

headline: Iran escalation compounds AI and credit worries, Barclays’ Cau warns
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays analysts, in a note Monday morning, highlighted the risks that European equities face as tensions between the United States and Iran escalated significantly over the weekend.

raw.headline: Iran escalation compounds AI and credit worries, Barclays’ Cau warns
